# `InteractiveResult`

A record mapping flag names to prompt configs or falsy values.

- `PromptConfig` — show this prompt for the flag
- `false | undefined | null | 0 | ''` — skip prompting for this flag

Only flag names that need prompting should have truthy values.
Flags not mentioned are handled by their per-flag `.prompt()` config.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: type
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/command.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/command.ts:88`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/command.ts#L88)

## Signatures

```ts
type InteractiveResult = Readonly<
  Record<string, PromptConfig | 'false' | undefined | 'null' | '0' | ''>
>;
```
